# Pull Request Template

## Description
<!-- Provide a brief description of your overlay or the changes you are introducing. -->
<!-- Make sure your PR title matches the required format:
     - New overlays: `new: <full_folder_name>` (e.g., `new: My PP Counter by Alice`)
     - Updates: `update(<full_folder_name>): <short description>` (e.g., `update(My PP Counter by Alice): fix display bug`)
-->

## Media (Screenshot or GIF)
<!-- Please paste or upload a screenshot or GIF showing your overlay in action here. -->

## Checklist
Before opening this Pull Request, please ensure you have completed the following steps:

- [ ] My overlay folder is located inside the `counters/` directory.
- [ ] My folder is named exactly following the `{Name} by {Author}` convention.
- [ ] I have read and complied with all rules in [RULES.md](.github/RULES.md).
